show-temp-in-panel.tooltip: When off, only the fan-state icon appears in the panel.

notify-on-critical.description: Show critical-notify popups on health errors
notify-on-critical.tooltip: Pops a desktop alert when cooling cannot keep up, the BIOS is fighting FanNode, or the daemon stops.

notify-on-recovery.description: Notify when temperatures return to normal
notify-on-recovery.tooltip: After a critical event, show a passive notification once temps recover.

status-file.tooltip: Override only if you've changed the daemon's STATUS_FILE.
